name: Creative AI Studio
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: Creative content generation — brand-voice copywriting, marketing campaigns, product descriptions, social media posts, blog articles, email sequences, and multi-variant content A/B testing with tone and style consistency

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput for high-volume campaign generation

services.name: Azure Blob Storage
services.purpose: Asset management — brand guidelines, style guides, tone-of-voice documents, generated content versions, media assets, campaign archives, and template libraries

dev.note: ~20GB, sample brand assets and test outputs

services.name: Azure AI Content Safety
services.purpose: Brand safety screening — ensures generated content meets brand guidelines, filters inappropriate language, detects potential trademark issues, and validates cultural sensitivity across target markets

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Content pipeline orchestration — generation workflow management, multi-variant creation, A/B test dispatch, content scheduling, approval routing, and publishing automation to downstream channels

enterprise.note: High-memory for batch campaign generation, ~20M executions/month

services.name: Azure CDN
services.purpose: Content delivery — published marketing assets, generated images, campaign landing pages, and downloadable content distributed globally with low latency for marketing teams and partners

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Content metadata store — brand voice profiles, campaign configurations, content versions with approval status, A/B test results, user feedback, and content performance analytics

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: OpenAI API keys, Content Safety credentials, storage access keys, CDN secrets, and publishing channel API tokens (social media, CMS integrations)

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Creative pipeline observability — content generation latency, brand-voice consistency scores, safety rejection rates, A/B variant performance, and content approval cycle time

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for high-volume repetitive content (product descriptions, meta tags, social media variants) and reserve GPT-4o for long-form creative writing (blog posts, whitepapers, campaign narratives) — reduces AI costs by 60%
Cache brand-voice system prompts and style guide embeddings — these rarely change, so loading them once per session eliminates redundant token consumption on every generation request
Batch multi-variant generation into single API calls where possible — generating 5 headline variants in one prompt is cheaper and faster than 5 separate API calls
Use Content Safety screening only on final approved content, not intermediate drafts — draft iterations account for 80% of generations but never reach end users
Implement a content template library with pre-approved structures — templated content requires only fill-in generation, reducing per-piece token cost by 40%
Use CDN Standard tier for most workloads and Premium only for enterprise with custom WAF rules — Standard handles global distribution at 60% lower cost
